title: psacalium pinetorum
intro: Psacalium pinetorum, also known as the Pineleaf psacalia, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Psacalium pinetorum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Psacalium pinetorum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the plant to make a powder that can be added to capsules or used topically in creams and ointments.
